seo.title: Docker for Docker & Containers
seo.description: How Docker fits into real Docker & Containers workflows.

content.headline: Dockerfile Best Practices Checker
content.description: Analyzes Dockerfiles for best practices, efficiency, and security vulnerabilities

examples.label: Basic Dockerfile

input.dockerfile:
FROM ubuntu:20.04
RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y python3

examples.expected_output: Recommendation: Use multi-stage build for better security and size.

examples.label: Insecure Configuration
examples.expected_output: Warning: Missing security headers. Add USER nonroot and HEALTHCHECK.

content.how_it_works: The tool analyzes the provided Dockerfile content against best practices, identifying issues related to security, efficiency, and image size. It checks for common pitfalls like using non-essential packages, missing security headers, and unnecessary layers.
